title: Total sum on chart bars - showing/not-showing
excerpt:

total value on a % Bar Chart appears for some on top and for others doesn’t appear. What is more, if $ value appears on the …

posts.author: Yonash (Jonasz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you please advise, why for some users the same chart appears differently when it goes to:

  • total value on a % Bar Chart appears for some on top and for others doesn’t appear. What is more, if $ value appears on the top it hides the % for the top item (red one, on the dark screenshot)


We tried different browsers - no changes. Sometimes minimizing and maximizing windows can help but still it’s not the rule for all - especially those ones where total $ value does not appear at all.

Are there any settings to fix it and first of all have similar experience for all users (showing or not showing total $ value on top) and always show all % for each part of the bar chart.

Thanks
